query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN catalogProductId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_catalog,
       SUM(CASE WHEN catalogProductId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_catalog
FROM deal_products;
